Proctoring Test Page
Dev-only page to test screen recording and transcript generation
Development only — disabled in production
Screen Recording Consent
This assessment includes optional screen recording to verify your work.
Periodic screenshots are captured every few seconds during the assessment — not continuous video.
Only your shared screen is captured. Your camera and microphone are never accessed.
You choose which screen(s) to share. You can stop sharing at any time.
I consent to screen recording during this assessment
Skip Recording
Continue with Recording
http://localhost:5173 is sharing your screen.
Stop sharing Hide

Expanded: OPEN EDITORS — highlighted: .env.local client. Also visible: claude-conversation-2026-02-10-eede47a9.md, config.env server, .gitignore server, CLAUDE.md, .gitignore client. Expanded: BRIDGE-ASSESSEMENTS — visible: FRONTEND_BACKEND_INTEGRATION.md, HOW_TO_SET_NODE_ENV.md, MONGODB_NETWORK_ACCESS.md, MONGODB_TROUBLESHOOTING.md, ONBOARDING_GUIDE.md, package-lock.json, package.json, PAYWALL_ENFORCEMENT.md, PRE_DEPLOYMENT_SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md, PRE_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md, PROCTORING.md, PRODUCTION_READINESS_CHECKLIST.md, QUICK_REFERENCE.md, RATE_LIMITING_AND_CORS_EXPLAINED.md, README.md, ROUTE_ACCESS.md, SCORING_IMPLEMENTATION.md, SCORING_SYSTEM_DESIGN.md, SUBMISSION_FLOW_GUIDE.md, SWITCHING_TO_PRODUCTION_WEBHOOK.md, TESTING_AGENT_TOOLS.md, TESTING_WEBHOOK.md, TROUBLESHOOT_SIGNUP.md, TROUBLESHOOTING_FAILED_FETCH.md, VERIFY_MONGODB_CONNECTION.md

read through th whole codebas...
Total estimated cost per 1-hour session: ~$2.00
Breakdown:
Component            Cost         % of total
---------------------------------------------
ai_chat (GPT-4o + Tesseract)    $1.89       94%
Region detection     $0.005    <1%
Editor (GPT-4o-mini + Tesseract)     $0.04     2%
Terminal (GPT-4o-mini + Tesseract)  $0.04     2%
File tree (GPT-4o-mini)          $0.01     <1%
Total                                  ~$2.00
Tesseract is saving roughly $3–5/hr by handling the clean text crops locally. Without it, the ai_chat cost alone would be ~$3.80 (double). The biggest cost driver is still ai_chat since it uses GPT-4o at high detail — but that's intentional since it's the highest-priority content.
